title: Department Manager Vacancy at Taj Hotels Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Taj Hotels Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Taj Hotels Retail is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Taj Hotels Retail:
Taj Hotels Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Taj Hotels Retail!
